scripts.predev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { $portPid = ($conn | Select-Object -First 1).OwningProcess; if ($portPid) { Stop-Process -Id $portPid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }"
